docs.name: Floating Dock
docs.description: macOS-style dock with magnetic scaling, spring physics, and tooltips.

props.name: items
props.description: Array defining mapping configuration objects containing icons and references.

props.name: id
props.description: A unique mapping identifier referencing the component node.

props.name: icon
props.description: The SVG image rendered actively on the dock interface.

props.name: label
props.description: String payload rendered inside the expanding tooltip layout.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Routine capturing specific explicit interactions mapped to the dock region.

props.name: href
props.description: Link routing path if the interface object encapsulates an anchor tag natively.

docs.overview: FloatingDock renders a macOS-style icon dock with a magnetic magnification effect. Icons near the cursor scale up smoothly, making navigation feel interactive and playful.

scenarios.title: App bottom navigation
scenarios.description: Replace a static mobile nav bar with a floating dock for a more expressive feel.

scenarios.title: Social media quick-share dock
scenarios.description: A share toolbar that floats alongside article content for quick social sharing.

scenarios.title: Document editor toolbar
scenarios.description: A compact formatting toolbar with magnification for a rich-text or canvas editor.
